creator: bmah@ca.sandia.gov
text:
It looks to me like there's no CVSup collection corresponding to
the /usr/ports/pilot directory.  (Shouldn't this be "ports-pilot"?)

How-To-Repeat: 
intruder:bmah% sudo cvsup -P - -g -L 2 supfiles/ports-current
Parsing supfile "supfiles/ports-current"
Looking up address of cvsup3.FreeBSD.org
Connecting to cvsup3.FreeBSD.org
Connected to cvsup3.FreeBSD.org
Server software version: REL_15_4_2
Negotiating file attribute support
Exchanging collection information
Server message: Unknown collection "ports-pilot"
Establishing passive-mode data connection
Running
